reviews.comment:
Un desastre. Fui a las 21 horas y no les quedaba nafta. Se la habían llevado toda los "vecinos" ... Yo entiendo empresario argentino que lo único que importa es ganar plata, pero sos el Automóvil Club Argentino, no Paraguayo ... Menos mal que no soy socio porque habría ido al cohete

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. I went at 9 p.m. and they were out of gas. The "neighbors" had taken it all... I understand, as an Argentine businessman, that the only thing that matters is making money, but you're the Argentine Automobile Club, not the Paraguayan Automobile Club... It's a good thing I'm not a member because I would have gone to hell.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKODZlNWRnEAE

reviews.comment:
Mi experiencia se muy mala, cargué nafta el lunes 26/6/23. Muy mal atendido, el personal de playa muy mal educado, pagué app y no me facturaron(me dijo la chica q me atendio que no pueden facturar cuando se paga con aplicación, cuando todo me facturan pague con pague) una cola de una cuadra, autos que ya habían cargado y no sé podían ir por que no le sacaban el pico del tanque. Falta personal, 3 personas no pueden atender 5 bica de expendio( si tienen más empleados ahí no estaban) LAMENTABLE..

(Translated by Google)
My experience was terrible. I filled up with gas on Monday, June 26, 2023. The service was awful, the attendants were incredibly rude, I paid via the app and they didn't give me a receipt (the girl who helped me said they can't issue receipts when you pay with an app, even though they always give receipts for everything I pay with). There was a line a block long, and cars that had already filled up couldn't leave because they wouldn't disconnect the fuel pump nozzle. They're understaffed; three people can't possibly manage five pumps (if they had more employees, they weren't there). It's a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKd2ZiZmt3RRAB
